case_number: Criminal Revision Application is dismissed for non-prosecution

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Revision No. S – 72 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on MA No.4219/2022 (Ex.A) 3. For hearing of main case. 24.10.2024 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional PG for the State >>>>>..<<<<< None has appeared on behalf of the applicant nor any intimation is received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing. The instant Criminal Revision Application pertains to year, 2022. The absence on the part of the applicant and his Counsel reflects that they are no more interest to pursue the same. Accordingly the instant Criminal Revision Application is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge ARBROHI
